title: Models – Responses API
description: OpenAI Responses API model classes, WebSocket transport, agent registration, and reasoning content replay

classes.name: OpenAIResponsesModel
methods: get_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing, previous_response_id, conversation_id, prompt) -> ModelResponse  [async]
stream_response(system_instructions, input, model_settings, tools, output_schema, handoffs, tracing, previous_response_id, conversation_id, prompt) -> AsyncIterator[TResponseStreamEvent]  [async]
classes.notes: Core HTTP-based Responses API implementation. Calls Converter to build tool params and response format.

classes.name: OpenAIResponsesWSModel
classes.notes: WebSocket transport: sends response.create frames, always streams events. get_response() consumes stream until terminal event. Manages persistent WS connection with loop-affinity and close-generation tracking.

classes.name: Converter
methods: convert_tool_choice(tool_choice, *, tools, handoffs, model) -> response_create_params.ToolChoice | Omit  [classmethod]
convert_tools(tools, handoffs, *, model, tool_choice, allow_opaque_tool_search_surface) -> ConvertedTools  [classmethod]
classes.notes: Static utility. Converts SDK Tool/Handoff objects to OpenAI ResponsesToolParam wire format.

classes.name: _ResponseStreamWithRequestId
classes.notes: Wraps raw Responses API stream; injects request_id into ResponseCompletedEvent.

classes.name: _WebsocketRequestTimeouts
classes.notes: Timeout configuration values for WS request phases (connect, request lock wait, stream).

classes.name: ResponsesWebSocketError
classes.notes: Raised when a WebSocket error event is received from the Responses API.

classes.name: OpenAIAgentRegistrationConfig
classes.notes: User-facing config for OpenAI agent harness registration. harness_id may also come from OPENAI_AGENT_HARNESS_ID env var.

classes.name: ResolvedOpenAIAgentRegistrationConfig
classes.notes: Post-resolution config – harness_id is guaranteed non-null.

classes.name: ResponsesWebSocketSession
classes.notes: Pins multiple Runner calls to one shared websocket-capable MultiProvider/RunConfig. Created via responses_websocket_session() async context manager.

classes.name: ReasoningContentSource
classes.notes: Holds a raw reasoning item candidate for replay into the next request.

classes.name: ReasoningContentReplayContext
classes.notes: Context passed to ShouldReplayReasoningContent hook. Composed with ReasoningContentSource.

module_level_functions: default_should_replay_reasoning_content(context: ReasoningContentReplayContext) -> bool  [replays only for DeepSeek models]
key_relationships: OpenAIResponsesModel uses Converter (static utility, no composition)
responses_websocket_session() factory creates MultiProvider + OpenAIProvider + ResponsesWebSocketSession
add_openai_harness_id_to_metadata() reads harness_id from model_provider via duck-typing (agent_registration / _agent_registration / openai_provider attributes)
important_notes: OpenAIResponsesWSModel maintains a per-event-loop websocket connection with close-generation versioning to detect stale connections
ReasoningContentReplay: default policy replays only for DeepSeek models; origin_model tracking prevents cross-family contamination
Agent harness_id resolution priority: explicit config > global default > OPENAI_AGENT_HARNESS_ID env var
ResponsesWebSocketSession enforces that run_config.model_provider is a MultiProvider and that its openai_provider is the same instance as session.provider
_ResponseStreamWithRequestId injects request_id into ResponseCompletedEvent at stream exhaustion for HTTP transport; WS transport does not expose request_id
Converter handles tool conversion including FunctionTool, ComputerTool, FileSearchTool, CodeInterpreterTool, CustomTool, ApplyPatchTool, MCP and Handoff tools
